overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an industrial airfield or warehouse complex in a desert environment. The character traverses rocky terrain and asphalt surfaces before entering a large hangar building. The scene features clear midday lighting and industrial architecture with metal-sided hangars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with hangar buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky desert terrain toward industrial hangar buildings in the distance

entered.detail: large beige industrial hangar with corrugated metal siding and horizontal windows
similar industrial hangar structure visible in the background
hazy mountain silhouette on the horizon
rough gravel and dirt surface with scattered stones

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open rocky desert area toward large industrial hangar buildings. The terrain is rough gravel with sparse dry vegetation, and the sky is clear blue. The hangars appear in the distance on the left side of the frame.

events.description: character steps from rocky terrain onto smooth paved asphalt surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the asphalt tarmac beside the large hangar building, moving toward the right side of the structure

entered.detail: smooth dark gray paved surface between hangar buildings

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from rocky ground to a paved asphalt tarmac area, walking alongside the main hangar building. The hangar wall is now prominent on the left, and the ground is smooth concrete or asphalt. The character continues walking parallel to the hangar structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: hangar exterior wall with side entrance

events.description: character approaches and enters the side door of the hangar building

agents.ego_description: turning toward the hangar wall and walking to the side entrance door, then entering the building

entered.detail: small blue metal door with window panel on the hangar wall
small electrical or utility box mounted on the hangar wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the side wall of the hangar building, walking toward a small blue door. The camera follows as the character reaches the door and enters the hangar interior, transitioning from the bright exterior to the darker interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, arid desert landscape into the shadowed interior of an industrial hangar. It begins with the character traversing rough gravel and sparse vegetation under a clear blue sky, moving steadily toward large metal buildings in the distance. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character from the rocky ground onto a smooth asphalt tarmac that runs parallel to the prominent wall of the main hangar. The scene then narrows as the character approaches a small blue door set into the side of the structure, before finally crossing the threshold and transitioning from the bright midday glare into the darker interior space.
